title: Chewy Indian Lentil Stir-fry
description: A hearty and flavorful herbal stir-fry made with French lentils that provides a comforting meal during sick days.
instructions: Heat a tablespoon of oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped garlic and grated ginger, sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Gradually add the lentils, mixed vegetables, and red bell pepper. Stir-fry for 5 minutes or until the vegetables start to soften.
If using curry powder, add it now and stir well to coat all ingredients evenly.
Add the chopped onion and continue stirring for another minute.
Pour in the vegetable broth or water, cover with a lid, reduce heat to low, and simmer for 5-7 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Turn off heat and let it sit covered for an additional 2 minutes to ensure all flavors meld together.
Garnish with fresh cilantro if desired before serving.
